properties.name: h-content-height
properties.description: If set, this element will display a vertical scrollbar

properties.name: h-content-width
properties.description: If set, this element will display a horizontal scrollbar

properties.name: h-disabled
properties.description: Whether the button is clickable or not. If true mouse click related event callbacks won't be triggered anymore

properties.name: h-flex-weight
properties.description: FlexWeight can be used to distribute any left-over space after explicit widths/heights have been subtracted

properties.name: h-hit-test-visible
properties.description: By default, most elements won't return themselves during a HitTest check unless they expose certain functionality that requires them to (e.g. a button). This means that elements visually underneath them might receive the input event instead. If you want this element to be returned during a HitTest set this to true

properties.name: h-is-hold-binding
properties.description: Whether this keybinding needs to be held down

properties.name: h-keep-scroll-position
properties.description: Whether to keep the scrolling position, even after the element has been unmounted

properties.name: h-layout-mode
properties.description: Determines how child elements will be laid out

properties.name: h-mask-texture-path
properties.description: Sets a mask texture to be used for clipping. (Doesn't support 9-patches yet)

properties.name: h-outline-color
properties.description: Sets the color for the outline to render

properties.name: h-outline-size
properties.description: Draws a basic outline around the element with the specified size

properties.name: h-overscroll
properties.description: If enabled scrolling areas will be extended by the size of the element

properties.name: h-padding-bottom

properties.name: h-tooltip-text
properties.description: Enables a text tooltip and sets the text to show. The tooltip will be shown while the mouse cursor is on this element

properties.name: h-tooltip-text-spans-color
properties.description: Enables a text tooltip and sets the text spans to show. The tooltip will be shown while the mouse cursor is on this element

properties.name: h-tooltip-text-spans-is-bold
properties.description: Enables a text tooltip and sets the text spans to show. The tooltip will be shown while the mouse cursor is on this element

properties.description: Enables a text tooltip and sets the text spans to show. The tooltip will be shown while the mouse cursor is on this element

properties.description: Enables a text tooltip and sets the text spans to show. The tooltip will be shown while the mouse cursor is on this element

properties.description: Enables a text tooltip and sets the text spans to show. The tooltip will be shown while the mouse cursor is on this element

properties.description: Enables a text tooltip and sets the text spans to show. The tooltip will be shown while the mouse cursor is on this element

properties.description: Enables a text tooltip and sets the text spans to show. The tooltip will be shown while the mouse cursor is on this element

properties.name: h-visible
properties.description: Hides the element. Makes the parent layouting skip this element as well

properties.name: h-auto-focus
properties.description: If true, the element will automatically set itself as the focused element when after being mounted. If there are other elements with this property enabled, the last of them to be mounted will gain focus.

properties.name: h-auto-grow
properties.description: Whether the input show grow for new lines or have a static height based on . Always enabled if MaxLines is not specified.

properties.name: h-auto-select-all
properties.description: Automatically selects all text after being mounted. This property won't work unless is enabled.

properties.name: h-is-read-only
properties.description: Whether the value of this field can be edited or not

properties.name: h-max-length
properties.description: The maximum amount of characters that can be entered into this field

properties.name: h-max-lines
properties.description: The maximum number of lines that can be entered in this field (0 for unlimited).

properties.name: h-placeholder-style-font-name
properties.description: Text style properties for placeholder text

properties.name: h-placeholder-style-font-size
properties.description: Text style properties for placeholder text

properties.name: h-placeholder-style-render-bold
properties.description: Text style properties for placeholder text

properties.name: h-placeholder-style-render-italics
properties.description: Text style properties for placeholder text

properties.name: h-placeholder-style-render-uppercase
properties.description: Text style properties for placeholder text

properties.name: h-placeholder-style-text-color
properties.description: Text style properties for placeholder text

properties.name: h-placeholder-text
properties.description: Text that will be displayed when the field is empty

properties.name: h-display-text-field
properties.description: If set to true a text field will be displayed that is showing the current hex color, for copy and pasting

properties.name: h-reset-transparency-when-changing-color
properties.description: If set to true and the color is being changed while the transparency is set to 0, the transparency will be set to opaque

properties.name: h-password-char
properties.description: Replaces all character occurences in this field with the specified character. Used for password fields

properties.name: h-min-size
properties.description: The minimum size considered when resizing panes. Not considered in layout algorithm.

properties.name: h-resize-at
properties.description: Position of the resizer, if at all

properties.name: h-resizer-size
properties.description: Width or height of the resizer

properties.name: h-step
properties.description: The amount by which to increment/decrement the value

properties.name: h-show-item-tooltip
properties.description: When true, shows the full item tooltip (with description, quality, etc.) on hover. Note: When inside an ItemSlotButton, leave this false - the parent handles tooltips.

properties.name: h-text-spans-color
properties.description: Text spans. Used for formatting text

properties.name: h-text-spans-is-bold
properties.description: Text spans. Used for formatting text

properties.name: h-text-spans-is-italics
properties.description: Text spans. Used for formatting text

properties.description: Text spans. Used for formatting text

properties.description: Text spans. Used for formatting text

properties.name: h-text-spans-is-uppercase
properties.description: Text spans. Used for formatting text

properties.name: h-text-spans-link
properties.description: Text spans. Used for formatting text

properties.name: h-text-spans-outline-color
properties.description: Text spans. Used for formatting text

properties.name: h-text-spans-params
properties.description: Text spans. Used for formatting text

properties.name: h-text-spans-text
properties.description: Text spans. Used for formatting text

properties.name: h-is-drag-enabled
properties.description: Allows to toggle whether this element is draggable or not

properties.name: h-angle
properties.description: Rotates this element by a specific angle in degrees

properties.name: h-auto-play
properties.description: Whether the animation should start playing automatically as soon as this element gets mounted

properties.name: h-frame-count
properties.description: Extra information that defines the layout of the sprite sheet texture

properties.name: h-frame-height
properties.description: Extra information that defines the layout of the sprite sheet texture

properties.name: h-frame-per-row
properties.description: Extra information that defines the layout of the sprite sheet texture

properties.name: h-frame-width
properties.description: Extra information that defines the layout of the sprite sheet texture

properties.name: h-frames-per-second
properties.description: How many frames should be displayed per second. Defines the speed of the animation

properties.name: h-repeat-count
properties.description: How often the sprite animation should be repeated. Should be set to 0 for looping infinite times
